item.title: TheConnorCain: Connor Cain @TheConnorCain · 54s Another howler to add to the catalogue from the so-called greatest keeper ever Cita Foo
item.description:
Connor Cain @TheConnorCain · 54s Another howler to add to the catalogue from the so-called greatest keeper ever Cita Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 2min Arda Güler scores from range just 45 seconds into the game after Neuer’s mistake
Stream with TNT Sports on HBO Max Este video no está disponible en tu ubicación. 2

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5min Ali Carter: ‘I don’t really want to play Ronnie.’
Yes let’s not have that again ple
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 5min Ali Carter: ‘I don’t really want to play Ronnie.’
Yes let’s not have that again please
#Snooker 1 2 101

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 12min 𝗖𝗔𝗣𝗧𝗔𝗜𝗡 𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗦 𝗖𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗜𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗢𝗧
Two-time World Championship finalist Ali Carter comes th
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 12min 𝗖𝗔𝗣𝗧𝗔𝗜𝗡 𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗦 𝗖𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗜𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗢𝗧
Two-time World Championship finalist Ali Carter comes through the qualifiers once again to book a 22nd Crucible berth, reeling off five frames in a row from 7-5 down to defeat Anthony McGill 10-7 Ali Carter 1 2 343

item.title: ProSnookerBlog: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 14min Five frames in a row for Ali Carter from 5-7 down - he defeats Anthony McGill 10-7 to book
item.description: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 14min Five frames in a row for Ali Carter from 5-7 down - he defeats Anthony McGill 10-7 to book his Crucible return. 5 163
